About: It is about trade in the Indian Ocean region.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with the East Indies.
BelongsTo: It belongs to the British Empire.

FoundedBy: It was founded by English merchants.
HasA: It has its own armed forces.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by its own armed forces.
Influenced: It influenced the beginnings of the British Raj in the Indian subcontinent.
KnownAs: It is known as the East India Company.
KnownFor: It is known for trading in basic commodities including cotton, silk, indigo dye, sugar, salt, spices, saltpetre, tea, gemstones, and later opium.

It occurred in the Indian subcontinent.
UsedIn: It is used in the Indian Ocean region.
UsedTo: It is used to trade in the Indian Ocean region.
